requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency — Ecodesign Requirements for Household Refrigerating Appliances
requirement_topic.zh: 能源效率——家用制冷器具生态设计要求
requirement_topic.zht: 能源效率——家用製冷器具生態設計要求

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Great Britain (GB) market must comply with the Energy-related Products and Energy Information (Household Refrigerating Appliances) Regulations 2021 (SI 2021/1295), which is the UK retained implementation of EU Regulation 2019/2019 (Ecodesign for household refrigerating appliances) and EU Regulation 2019/2016 (energy labelling). The regulations set minimum energy performance requirements expressed as an Energy Efficiency Index (EEI) — from 1 March 2021, no refrigerating appliance with EEI ≥ 80 may be placed on the GB market. A new A-to-G energy label (replacing the old A+/A++/A+++ scale) with a QR code linking to the GB Product Database (GPDB) / GB EPREL equivalent is mandatory. Climate classes (SN, N, ST, T) and specific temperature range requirements for food compartments must be met and declared.
summary.zh: 在英国大不列颠（GB）市场销售的家用制冷电器须符合《能源相关产品与能源信息（家用制冷器具）条例2021》（SI 2021/1295），该条例为欧盟法规2019/2019（家用制冷器具生态设计）及欧盟法规2019/2016（能效标签）的英国留用实施法规。法规以能效指数（EEI）设定最低能效要求——自2021年3月1日起，EEI≥80的制冷器具不得在英国GB市场销售。须强制张贴含QR码的新版A至G能效标签（取代旧版A+/A++/A+++评级体系），QR码链接至英国产品数据库（GPDB）/英国EPREL等效注册系统。产品须满足并申报气候等级（SN、N、ST、T）及食品隔间的具体温度范围要求。
summary.zht: 在英國大不列顛（GB）市場銷售的家用製冷電器須符合《能源相關產品與能源資訊（家用製冷器具）條例2021》（SI 2021/1295），該條例為歐盟法規2019/2019（家用製冷器具生態設計）及歐盟法規2019/2016（能效標籤）的英國留用實施法規。法規以能效指數（EEI）設定最低能效要求——自2021年3月1日起，EEI≥80的製冷器具不得在英國GB市場銷售。須強制張貼含QR碼的新版A至G能效標籤（取代舊版A+/A++/A+++評級體系），QR碼連結至英國產品資料庫（GPDB）/英國EPREL等效登記系統。產品須滿足並申報氣候等級（SN、N、ST、T）及食品隔間的具體溫度範圍要求。

standards_or_laws: Energy-related Products and Energy Information (Household Refrigerating Appliances) Regulations 2021 (SI 2021/1295)
Commission Regulation (EU) 2019/2019 (retained in UK law as basis for SI 2021/1295) — Ecodesign requirements for household refrigerating appliances
Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2019/2016 (retained in UK law) — Energy labelling of household refrigerating appliances

summary.en: China mandates energy efficiency compliance under GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators), enforced under the China Energy Label scheme administered by NDRC and SAMR. The Chinese system uses a 1-to-5 grade scale (Grade 1 being most efficient). Energy consumption testing follows GB/T 8059 series standards. China's energy label and test methodology differ substantially from the UK EEI-based system — Chinese Grade 1/2 ratings are not directly comparable to UK A-G labels. Registration in China's energy label filing system (energylabel.cn) does not satisfy the UK GPDB/EPREL-equivalent registration requirement.
summary.zh: 中国依据GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能源效率等级）强制执行能效合规要求，由国家发展和改革委员会及市场监管总局负责执行中国能效标识制度。中国体系采用1至5级评定（1级最高效），能耗测试依据GB/T 8059系列标准。中国能效标识与测试方法与英国基于EEI的体系存在实质性差异——中国1级/2级评定与英国A-G标签不可直接比较。在中国能效标识备案系统（energylabel.cn）的注册不满足英国GPDB/EPREL等效注册要求。
summary.zht: 中國依據GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能源效率等級）強制執行能效合規要求，由國家發展和改革委員會及市場監管總局負責執行中國能效標識制度。中國體系採用1至5級評定（1級最高效），能耗測試依據GB/T 8059系列標準。中國能效標識與測試方法與英國基於EEI的體系存在實質性差異——中國1級/2級評定與英國A-G標籤不可直接比較。在中國能效標識備案系統（energylabel.cn）的登記不滿足英國GPDB/EPREL等效登記要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (NDRC/SAMR)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Methods for measuring the performance of household and similar refrigerating appliances (SAC)

gap.en: Three distinct gaps exist: (1) Performance gap — the product EEI must be below 80 (calculated per Annex IV of EU 2019/2019 / SI 2021/1295 methodology), which may not align with Chinese GB 12021.2 Grade 1 products depending on the model; (2) Label gap — a UK-compliant A-G energy label with QR code must be physically affixed; the Chinese energy label format is not accepted; (3) Registration gap — the product must be registered in the UK GPDB or equivalent GB register before supply; no Chinese registry entry substitutes. Additionally, the noise declaration and net/gross volume measurement methodology must follow EN 15502-1 or equivalent UK-designated standards, which differ from Chinese test methods.
gap.zh: 存在三项差距：（1）性能差距——产品EEI须低于80（按欧盟法规2019/2019/SI 2021/1295附件四方法计算），具体数值可能因型号而异，与中国GB 12021.2的一级评定不一定对应；（2）标签差距——须在产品上实物粘贴含QR码的英国合规A至G能效标签，中国能效标签格式不被接受；（3）注册差距——产品须在供货前在英国GPDB或等效英国注册系统中完成注册，中国任何注册记录均不可替代。此外，噪声声明及净/总容积测量方法须遵循EN 15502-1或等效英国指定标准，与中国检测方法存在差异。
gap.zht: 存在三項差距：（1）性能差距——產品EEI須低於80（按歐盟法規2019/2019/SI 2021/1295附件四方法計算），具體數值可能因型號而異，與中國GB 12021.2的一級評定不一定對應；（2）標籤差距——須在產品上實物黏貼含QR碼的英國合規A至G能效標籤，中國能效標籤格式不被接受；（3）登記差距——產品須在供貨前在英國GPDB或等效英國登記系統中完成登記，中國任何登記記錄均不可替代。此外，噪聲聲明及淨/總容積測量方法須遵循EN 15502-1或等效英國指定標準，與中國檢測方法存在差異。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EEI compliance, A-G energy label, and GPDB registration all required under SI 2021/1295 before GB market placement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (Grade 1–5) and GB 12021.2 compliance required under NDRC/SAMR framework for domestic China market

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SI 2021/1295 imposes mandatory EEI limits, a new A-G energy label with QR code, and GPDB product registration before GB market supply. Chinese GB 12021.2 energy labels and energylabel.cn registration do not satisfy any of these three requirements. Re-testing to UK/EU methodology, re-labelling, and fresh GPDB registration are all required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】SI 2021/1295规定了强制性EEI限值、含QR码的新版A至G能效标签，以及在英国GB市场供货前须完成的GPDB产品注册。中国GB 12021.2能效标签及energylabel.cn注册不满足上述三项要求中的任何一项。须按照英国/欧盟方法重新检测、重新贴标，并完成GPDB全新注册。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】SI 2021/1295規定了強制性EEI限值、含QR碼的新版A至G能效標籤，以及在英國GB市場供貨前須完成的GPDB產品登記。中國GB 12021.2能效標籤及energylabel.cn登記不滿足上述三項要求中的任何一項。須按照英國/歐盟方法重新檢測、重新貼標，並完成GPDB全新登記。
